employees.title: Retail Sales Overview
employees.description: Executive dashboard for retail analytics featuring KPIs, trends, drill-down analysis and operational metrics.
employees.accessHTML:
✅

Public Dashboard

This dashboard is available to all authenticated users and does not require any additional approval.

Access Details

EnvironmentEDH-P
PermissionDefault User Access
StatusAvailable Immediately

Getting Started

Simply open the dashboard using the provided link. No CAIMAN request is required.

Need Help?

employees.title: Store Performance
employees.description: Executive dashboard for retail analytics featuring KPIs, trends, drill-down analysis and operational metrics.
employees.accessHTML:
🔒

Restricted Dashboard

Access requires approval from the business owner before data becomes available.

Required Access

EnvironmentEDH-P
Required RoleretailAnalyticsConsumer
Request TypeRole Request

Access Process

1

Submit Request

Request the retailAnalyticsConsumer role.

2

Approval

Business owner approval required.

3

Synchronization

Access is updated within 24 hours.
